case_title: EDWARD F. MILLER ET AL VS. ANDREW R. BISSELL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUN-21-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BISSELL, ANDREW R.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, EDWARD F. BRAL, RITA M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BISSELL, ANDREW R. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-27-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-27-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS EDWARD MILLER & RITA BRAL, AND DEFENDANT ANDREW BISSEL. DAVID PALCHAK, A WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS RETURNED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
